impact: This gives the isolated PP&D daemon ordered next work aligned with the original public crawling, DevHub draft-readiness, provenance, and formal-logic guardrail goals while keeping the next cycles fixture-only, validation-first, and free of live crawl or authenticated automation side effects.
summary: Appended a new narrow fixture-first PP&D backlog tranche for the worker daemon to continue after the completed formal-logic and autonomous-assistance tranche.
target_task: Supervisor repair: all PP&D daemon tasks are complete; review the original PP&D goal and add the next task-board tranche

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
